title: Canadian Eva 30 ticket giveaway
wikitext:
[]: Canadian Eva 3.0 ticket giveaway             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jan 02, 2014 10:07 pm News post: https://www.evageeks.org/2014/01/canadian-3-0-ticket-giveaway/ Anybody here in Canada gonna enter the giveaway, or plan on attending a screening?

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Jan 03, 2014 8:51 am Already have my ticket for the 16th in Ottawa.

[]:             Quote Post by LegionWrex » Fri Jan 03, 2014 2:10 pm I entered the giveaway for tickets in Windsor as soon as it came up.

[]:             Quote Post by Karazaki » Sun Jan 05, 2014 3:14 pm I've already got my ticket for the Ottawa screening on the 11th. I'm pretty excited to finally see a NTE film in theatres!
